description: Rise of Avalon Patch 7 - Hotfix 2 (23 October 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where Tanner and Lumbermill refining stations were regenerating their capacities too slowly
Desktop versions (PC / Mac / Linux) show correct behavior; mobile displays incorrect timers but works correctly
UI discrepancy on mobile will be fixed in the next patch
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Tanner Lumbermill refining stations capacity regeneration slow mobile UI timers
